select_when: The task is prediction under uncertainty and the organization can learn from enough observations to update performance meaningfully.
The team must balance model complexity, generalization, and decision usefulness rather than chase fit on one sample.
Forecasting quality or probabilistic calibration matters more than elegant intuition or explanation alone.
Before building a model, the team can answer whether it is trying to understand causation or predict a state of the world.
avoid_when: Model worship is treating statistical learning as a universal answer even though the target is poorly defined, the data is thin, or causal understanding matters more than prediction.
The analysis is being started before the problem structure, objective, or testable hypotheses are clear.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model on prediction-versus-causation choice, generalization discipline, and anti-model-worship boundaries rather than broad machine-learning branding.
donor_drops: Did not preserve implementation-detail sprawl because the raw source is strongest on framing, generalization, and disciplined model choice.
open_questions: The output label compresses a source that spans forecasting, expert systems, and AI twin modeling.

select_when.note: The strengths and playbook sections explicitly support prediction tasks, generalization, and the causation-versus-prediction diagnostic.

avoid_when.note: Both anti-activation conditions come directly from the model-worship and premature-analysis warnings.

input_type.note: The source activates around prediction and generalization under uncertainty, while the compact type label is reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The playbook yields disciplined predictive posture rather than any one algorithm; the output label compresses that operationally.

reasoning_types.note: The model is probabilistic in how it learns from observations and deductive in how it frames objective, structure, and testability.
